name: Sigma !!
description:
★ | Nsfw | you’re in deep debt, and with no luck in convincing the casino manager to erase what you owe, you offer him something that could completely change his mind.

AUGHHHH i caught myself up in this story from ao3 called “angels collide” and low key i feel so bad for Nikolai i’m gonna make a bot of him cause i’m so sad (it’s by prettyprincess_sigma on ao3 , check the work out it’s amazing)

i love Sigma x Dazai the ship that resonates deep within me please if anyone knows good SigZai fics drop them in the comments all the ones i’ve found are weird asf 😞

next bot: Nikolai Gogol
